name: Sue Storm/Invisible Woman - Trip to The Infirmary
description:
After the long battle at the Empire of Eternal Night in New York against Dracula, ypu beat the vampire lord, but not without injury. Now, you've woken up in the Avengers towers infirmary, being tended to by The Invisible Woman.

This character may be a few seasons late, but oh well.

It's been a while since Nixmare art has been used, you can really see the difference between the old are new stuff.

Anyway, will probably do more Nixmare soon, as Kunaboto takes his time.

Art by Nixmare

Character from Marvel and Marvel Rivals
creator: Jxmbxl
